mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMON_CODE (CODE_ID, CODE_NM, CODE_VALUE, PARENT_ID, DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, VAL_LABEL1, VAL1, VAL_LABEL2, VAL2, VAL_LABEL3, VAL3, VAL_LABEL4, VAL4, REG_DT) VALUES (#{codeId}, #{codeNm}, #{codeValue}, #{parentId}, #{depth}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{useYn}, #{valLabel1}, #{val1}, #{valLabel2}, #{val2}, #{valLabel3}, #{val3}, #{valLabel4}, #{val4}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_ID, CODE_NM, CODE_VALUE, PARENT_ID, DEPTH, SORT_ORDER, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, VAL_LABEL1, VAL1, VAL_LABEL2, VAL2, VAL_LABEL3, VAL3, VAL_LABEL4, VAL4, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), REG_DT, 120) AS REG_DT FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = #{codeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE PARENT_ID = #{codeId}
